ItacPersonItem.Notes: Also called Filippo Napoletano. Painter and engraver. See Bartsch, Peintres graveurs, XV, 129-206, and Grabrieli, Contributi, vol. II (1989). Faber pays tribute to Liano`s achievements in Aliorum Novae Hispaniae Animalium, p. 530
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
